Subject: Entelligence AI raises $5M to redefine how engineering teams ship!
Message-ID: <20260108171713.3.b3e8145b32b20300@mg2.substack.com>
In-Reply-To: <post-183876476@substack.com>

View this post on the web at https://aiswaryaentelligenceai.substack.com/p/entelligence-ai-raises-5m-to-redefine

We’re excited to announce that  [ https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bedb923d-fdcb-49d6-9b31-e110e7bfe3c8?j=eyJ1IjoiNHFkNTF0In0.3VeGxV4zk4PWCIHpd0Onx-O6RwY6Z7JeNCNSiNEVLgU ]Enteligence.ai [ https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bedb923d-fdcb-49d6-9b31-e110e7bfe3c8?j=eyJ1IjoiNHFkNTF0In0.3VeGxV4zk4PWCIHpd0Onx-O6RwY6Z7JeNCNSiNEVLgU ]  [ https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bedb923d-fdcb-49d6-9b31-e110e7bfe3c8?j=eyJ1IjoiNHFkNTF0In0.3VeGxV4zk4PWCIHpd0Onx-O6RwY6Z7JeNCNSiNEVLgU ]has raised a $5M Seed round led by Mayfield, with participation from Correlation Ventures, alongside an incredible group of angels and operators from Zapier, GitLab, Cisco, and Nvidia.
Like , Share & Repost!
This milestone fuels our mission to help engineering teams ship faster, smarter, and with greater confidence.
Alongside this, we’re unveiling a revamped Entelligence.ai experience more contextual, more insightful, including Ask Ellie, our code review CLI and more -designed to empower developers and engineering leaders alike.
